parentQuestion: Which of the following is NOT a function of epithelial tissue?

scaffolds.q: What does absorption mean in biological terms?
scaffolds.explain: Absorption means taking in or assimilating substances from outside the cell or organism. For example, intestinal cells absorb nutrients from digested food.

scaffolds.q: Which of the four primary tissue types provides structural support to the body?
scaffolds.explain: Connective tissue provides structural support to the body. It includes bone, cartilage, ligaments, and tendons — all structures that support and bind other tissues together.
